mapper.update:
MERGE INTO CO_INFORMATION c USING (
SELECT #{stockCode} AS STOCK_CODE, #{corpCode} AS CORP_CODE, #{corpName} AS CO_NAME FROM DUAL
WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM STOCKS s WHERE s.STOCK_CODE = #{stockCode} )
) s
ON ( c.STOCK_CODE = s.STOCK_CODE )
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET c.CORP_CODE = s.CORP_CODE, c.CO_NAME = s.CO_NAME, c.UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( CORP_CODE, STOCK_CODE, CO_NAME, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( s.CORP_CODE, s.STOCK_CODE, s.CO_NAME, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT CORP_CODE, STOCK_CODE FROM CO_INFORMATION WHERE CORP_CODE IS NOT NULL AND STOCK_CODE IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE CO_INFORMATION SET ISSUED_STOCK = #{issuedStock}, DECLINED_STOCK = #{declinedStock}, TREASURY_STOCK = #{treasuryStock}, OUTSTANDING_SHARES = #{outstandingShares}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE STOCK_CODE = #{stockCode}
UPDATE CO_INFORMATION SET MINORITY_SHAREHOLDER_RATIO = #{minorityShareholderRatio}, MINORITY_OWNERSHIP_RATIO = #{minorityOwnershipRatio}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE STOCK_CODE = #{stockCode}
